name: counterfactual-branch
description: Forks the current mission into N short-horizon simulations, one per surviving hypothesis. simulate_all writes both simulation-summary.json (LLM output) and simulation-quality.json (deterministic rubric: has_branches / failure_xor_success / unique_branch_ids / reaches_terminal_mode / outcome_balance / non_trivial_termination_depth). Results merge back as meta-evidence only. See knowledge/public/orchestration/counterfactual-simulation-protocol.md.

params.goal: Reach first failure mode OR first success mode, whichever comes first.
